name: mcpier-official
description: A small curated set to get started. For everything else, use 'Install from Git' in the UI or `pier install-git <url>` — any MCP repo with a pier.yaml is one paste away.

entries.name: filesystem
entries.description: Local filesystem access — read, write, list files in a sandboxed directory.

entries.name: memory
entries.description: Knowledge-graph memory for persistent facts across conversations (official Anthropic reference).

entries.name: fetch
entries.description: Fetch a URL and return its content — no browser, just HTTP. Official Python reference.

entries.name: git
entries.description: Git repository operations — log, diff, branch, commit. Official Python reference.

entries.name: time
entries.description: Timezone-aware time and date utilities. Official Python reference.

entries.name: playwright
entries.description: Browser automation from Microsoft — multi-browser, screenshots, accessibility tree.

entries.name: context7
entries.description: Up-to-date library docs and code examples for LLM prompts (Upstash).

entries.name: brainstorm-mcp
entries.description: Multi-model AI brainstorming — make GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Claude debate in rounds.

entries.name: saga-mcp
entries.description: Jira-like project tracker for AI agents — projects, epics, tasks, subtasks, comments, templates. SQLite-backed, zero external services.

entries.name: discord-mcp
entries.description: Discord integration — read/send messages, manage channels and roles from an AI agent.

entries.name: truenas-mcp
entries.description: Comprehensive TrueNAS SCALE integration — 278 actions covering storage, shares, VMs, Docker, users, alerts, and the full REST API.

entries.name: swarmcode
entries.description: Real-time cross-machine communication between Claude Code instances via Redis pub/sub. Per-workspace isolation, web dashboard.

entries.name: yantrikdb-mcp
entries.description: Persistent cognitive memory engine — recall/remember/graph/relate/correct across conversations. Hierarchical, embedding-backed, self-updating.
